name: Easter Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pastel-coloured candy-coated chocolate pieces or pastel-colored vanilla chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix in flour, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture at low speed until just blended. Stir in candy-coated pieces or vanilla chips.
4. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies. Do not overbake. Cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes before removing cookies to cool completely.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
